coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 20-group, 319-node root closure; three evaluated dowel dependencies are included.
validation: Authored output and five non-cutter control variants have exact topology and bounds. Cutter mode has identical bounds but GN-VM's Manifold solid boolean simplifies the internal result to 24,354 / 24,156 versus Blender's 29,705 / 27,431.
